title: Some By Mi Propolis B5 Glow Barrier Calming Oil to Foam 120ml
content_html:
Some By Mi Propolis B5 Glow Barrier Calming Cleanser is a foam face wash formulated with propolis extract and panthenol (B5) to soothe and hydrate sensitive skin—an ideal match for Bangladesh's humid climate where irritation and barrier disruption are common concerns.

This gentle oil-to-foam cleanser pairs perfectly with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after cleansing, locking in hydration without stripping. Use it as the first step in your AM or PM routine, followed by toner, serum, and moisturiser.

Key Benefits

  • Calms sensitivity — Propolis extract soothes and calms reactive skin
  • Hydrates and nourishes — B5 (panthenol) replenishes moisture and supports barrier function
  • Preserves moisture barrier — Oil-to-foam formula cleanses effectively without stripping natural oils
  • Leaves skin soft and supple — Maintains a healthy, comfortable feel after washing

Key Ingredients

Propolis Extract — Soothes and calms sensitive skin, reducing redness and irritation.

B5 (Panthenol) — Hydrates and nourishes the skin, supporting moisture retention and barrier repair.

Best For

  • Sensitive skin
  • Dry or dehydrated skin
  • Compromised moisture barrier

Not Recommended For

  • Oily or acne-prone skin — The rich, hydrating formula may feel too heavy if you prefer a deep-cleansing or purifying wash

How to Use

  1. Apply a small amount of product onto damp skin
  2. Massage gently for about 30 seconds to create a rich lather
  3. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water
  4. Pat dry with a clean towel
  5. Follow up with your regular skincare routine

Routine Fit

Use as the first step in your AM or PM routine. After cleansing, apply an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp, then follow with serum and moisturiser.
meta_desc: Some By Mi propolis B5 foam cleanser for sensitive, dry skin — calms and hydrates. Authentic South Korean import — buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: Bioderma Sebium Gel Moussant Cleansing Foaming Gel 200ml
content_html:
The Bioderma Sebium Gel Moussant Cleansing Foam is a gentle foaming face wash designed for combination to oily skin in Bangladesh's humid climate. Infused with Niacinamide and Zinc PCA, it helps regulate sebum while soothing sensitivity, making it a reliable daily cleanser that won't strip moisture.

This foam pairs well with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after cleansing. For best results, follow with a lightweight serum or moisturiser. In your routine, use this as your second step after an oil cleanser if double-cleansing, or as the sole cleanser for normal to oily skin.

Key Benefits

  • Sebum regulation — Zinc PCA controls oil production without over-drying
  • Brightens + smooths — Niacinamide and Gluconolactone refine texture and even tone
  • Gentle exfoliation — Salicylic Acid unclogs pores while D-Panthenol calms irritation

Key Ingredients

Zinc PCA — Regulates sebum and has anti-inflammatory properties

Niacinamide — Brightens skin and strengthens the moisture barrier

Salicylic Acid — Oil-soluble BHA that penetrates pores to reduce blackheads

Gluconolactone — A mild PHA that exfoliates without irritating sensitive skin

Aloe Vera Extract — Hydrates and soothes post-cleansing tightness

D-Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) — Repairs the skin barrier and reduces redness

Best For

  • Combination to oily skin
  • Sensitive, acne-prone skin needing gentle exfoliation
  • Those who want a non-stripping foam cleanser

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry, dehydrated skin — Salicylic Acid may increase dryness; opt for a cream or lotion cleanser instead
  • Active eczema or severely compromised barrier — BHA and Gluconolactone can further irritate

How to Use

  1. Wet face with lukewarm water
  2. Dispense 1–2 pumps into palms and lather until foamy
  3. Gently massage over face for 30–60 seconds, avoiding eye area
  4. Rinse thoroughly with cool water and pat dry with a clean towel

Routine Fit

Use morning and evening as the cleansing step. In a double-cleanse routine, apply after an oil cleanser. After rinsing, go in with an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then serum and moisturiser.
meta_desc: Bioderma foaming face wash for oily, sensitive skin with Niacinamide & Zinc PCA — sebum control + gentle cleansing. Buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: SOME BY MI Snail Truecica Miracle Repair Low pH Gel Cleanser 100ml
content_html:
Some By Mi Snail Truecica Miracle Repair Low is a gentle gel cleanser formulated with Truecica and Snail Secretion Filtrate, ideal for acne-prone and sensitive skin. In Bangladesh's humid climate, this low-pH formula helps control excess oil while soothing irritation and supporting the skin barrier.

This gel cleanser pairs well with an alcohol-free toner or lightweight essence after cleansing. Use it as the first step in your routine to remove impurities without stripping the skin.

Key Benefits

  • Acne & Blemish Control — Truecica soothes breakouts and reduces redness
  • Sensitive Skin Relief — Snail Secretion Filtrate calms irritation and supports barrier repair
  • Gentle Cleansing — Gel texture removes dirt and excess sebum without over-drying

Key Ingredients

Truecica — A blend of Centella Asiatica and Tea Tree that targets acne and soothes inflammation

Snail Secretion Filtrate — Moisturizing and repairing ingredient that helps restore the skin barrier and improve texture

Best For

  • Acne-prone skin
  • Sensitive skin

Not Recommended For

  • Those with known allergies to snail mucin or Centella Asiatica — may cause irritation
  • Very dry skin without a hydrating follow-up — gel cleansers can be slightly stripping if not paired with moisturizer

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense a small amount of gel cleanser onto your palm and lather gently.
  3. Massage onto damp skin in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, focusing on oily areas.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry.

Routine Fit

Use in both AM and PM as the first step after makeup removal. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner or lightweight essence to lock in hydration.
meta_desc: Some By Mi gel cleanser with Truecica and snail filtrate for acne-prone, sensitive skin — South Korean import. Buy at Emart Bangladesh with COD delivery.

title: The Body Shop Seaweed Deep Cleansing Gel Wash 125ml

Formulated with community-traded seaweed from the brand's UK heritage, this wash removes impurities without stripping, making it ideal for the daily grime and sweat of Dhaka traffic or Chittagong port air.

For a balanced routine, pair this gel wash with an alcohol-free toner or lightweight essence immediately after cleansing. This step replenishes hydration and preps skin for subsequent serums or moisturisers.

title: Garnier Skin Active Micellar Cleansing Gel Wash 200ml
content_html:

Pair this micellar gel with a gentle foam cleanser as a second step — micellar water alone may not fully remove SPF or heavy makeup. Use in the evening after makeup removal for a complete clean.

Hydrating Ingredients — help replenish moisture lost during cleansing, leaving skin soft

Soothing Properties — reduce redness or irritation for reactive skin types

Best For

Not Recommended For

title: Some By Mi aha bha pha 30 Days Cleansing Bar
content_html:
The Some By Mi AHA BHA PHA 30 Days Cleansing Bar is a gentle exfoliating foam bar formulated with a triple-acid complex of AHA, BHA, and PHA. Designed for acne-prone skin, it helps unclog pores and refine texture — an ideal choice for Bangladesh's humid climate where excess sebum and breakouts are common.

For a complete cleansing routine, follow this bar with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin. This rebalances pH and prepares the skin for serums or moisturisers, making it the perfect first step in your evening skincare regimen.

Key Benefits

  • Exfoliates dead skin cells — AHA dissolves surface buildup for a smoother complexion
  • Unclogs pores — BHA penetrates deep into pores to clear sebum and reduce blackheads
  • Controls acne breakouts — Regular use helps prevent new blemishes
  • Gentle exfoliation — PHA provides mild exfoliation without stripping the skin

Key Ingredients

AHA (Alpha Hydroxy Acids) — Water-soluble acids that exfoliate the skin's surface to reveal brighter, smoother skin.

BHA (Beta Hydroxy Acids) — Oil-soluble acids that penetrate pores to dissolve excess sebum and debris, reducing congestion.

PHA (Polyhydroxy Acids) — A gentler acid that exfoliates while providing hydration, suitable for slightly sensitive skin.

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Acne-prone skin
  • Combination skin

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or sensitive skin — the exfoliating acids may cause irritation or further dryness
  • Compromised skin barrier — wait until the barrier is restored before using acid-based cleansers

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Lather the cleansing bar between your hands until a rich foam forms.
  3. Gently massage the foam onto your face in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel.
  5. Follow with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp.

Routine Fit

Use as the first step of your evening skincare routine. After cleansing, apply an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then follow with a serum and moisturiser. For best results, use once daily in the evening; if your skin tolerates it well, you may also use it in the morning.
meta_desc: Some By Mi cleansing bar with AHA BHA PHA for acne-prone, oily skin — gentle exfoliation. Authentic South Korean import at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: The Derma CO 1% Kojic Acid Daily Face Wash 100ml
content_html:
The Derma Co 1% Kojic Acid Daily Face Wash is a foam cleanser formulated to target hyperpigmentation and dullness. In Bangladesh's humid climate, where excess melanin production can be triggered by sun exposure and pollution, the 1% Kojic Acid helps inhibit tyrosinase activity for a more even, brighter complexion.

This foam cleanser pairs well with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after cleansing. Use it in your morning or evening routine as the first step — it preps the skin to better absorb subsequent brightening serums and moisturisers.

Key Benefits

  • Brightening — Kojic Acid reduces the appearance of dark spots and uneven tone by blocking melanin synthesis
  • Hyperpigmentation control — helps fade post-acne marks and sun-induced pigmentation

Key Ingredients

Kojic Acid (1%) — a natural skin-lightening agent derived from fungi that inhibits tyrosinase, the enzyme responsible for melanin production.

Best For

  • Dull, uneven skin tone
  • Hyperpigmentation-prone skin
  • Oily and combination skin types

Not Recommended For

  • Very dry or compromised skin — Kojic Acid may cause irritation if the moisture barrier is weak
  • Those allergic to fermented ingredients — Kojic Acid is derived from fungi fermentation

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense a pea-sized amount of the foam cleanser into your palm.
  3. Lather gently between your hands, then massage onto damp skin in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry with a clean towel.

Routine Fit

Use in the AM or PM as the first step after removing makeup or sunscreen. Follow with an alcohol-free toner applied to still-damp skin, then a brightening serum and moisturiser. In the AM, always finish with sunscreen.
meta_desc: The Derma Co foam cleanser for hyperpigmentation with 1% Kojic Acid — brightens uneven tone. Buy original at Emart Bangladesh — COD available.

title: SKINFOOD-Rice Daily Brightening Cleansing Foam
content_html:
SKINFOOD Rice Daily Brightening Cleansing Foam harnesses the power of Cheorwon Odae Rice Bran Water to gently cleanse and brighten dull, hyperpigmented skin. In Bangladesh's humid climate, this foam removes excess oil and impurities without stripping, helping to reveal a more even, radiant complexion.

As a foam cleanser, it pairs perfectly with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin to restore pH balance and prep for serums. Use it in your morning or evening routine after removing makeup with an oil or balm cleanser for a thorough double-cleanse.

Key Benefits

  • Brightening — Rice bran water is rich in vitamins and minerals that help fade dark spots and promote a luminous skin tone
  • Gentle cleansing — Foam formulation effectively washes away dirt, sebum, and impurities without over-drying
  • Hydration — Rice extract helps maintain the skin's moisture barrier, leaving it soft and supple

Key Ingredients

Cheorwon Odae Rice Bran Water — A traditional Korean ingredient known for brightening properties; it contains phytic acid, ferulic acid, and vitamins to gently exfoliate and even out skin tone while providing nourishment.

Best For

  • Dull, lackluster skin needing brightening
  • Hyperpigmentation concerns (dark spots, uneven tone)
  • Normal, combination, and oily skin types

Not Recommended For

  • Individuals with a known allergy to rice or rice-derived ingredients — may cause sensitivity or irritation
  • Extremely dry or compromised skin barriers — the foaming nature could be slightly drying; consider a cream cleanser instead

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense a small amount (about a pea-sized) onto your palm and lather with water.
  3. Gently massage the foam onto your face in circular motions, avoiding the eye area.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry.
  5. Follow immediately with a hydrating, alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp.

Routine Fit

Use this foam as the second step in a double-cleansing routine after an oil-based cleanser, or as a standalone morning wash. After cleansing, apply an alcohol-free toner to damp skin, then follow with serum, moisturizer, and sunscreen (daytime).
meta_desc: SKINFOOD Rice Brightening Foam for dull, hyperpigmented skin with rice bran extract — brighten. Authentic South Korean import at Emart Bangladesh — COD.

  • Dehydrated skin

Not Recommended For

  • Very oily or acne-prone skin — the hydrating formula may feel too rich if you prefer a more mattifying cleanse

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Dispense 1–2 pumps of foam onto your palm.
  3. Gently massage over face and neck for 30–60 seconds.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry.

Routine Fit

Use after removing makeup or sunscreen. Follow with an alcohol-free toner while skin is still slightly damp, then apply a hydrating serum and moisturiser.
meta_desc: Simple foam cleanser with Pro-Vitamin B5 for dry, sensitive skin — hydrates without stripping. Pro-Vitamin B5 formula — buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

title: Mamaearth Charcoal Face Wash 100ml
content_html:
Mamaearth Charcoal Face Wash for oily, acne-prone skin in Bangladesh's humid climate — activated charcoal and neem work together to absorb excess oil and remove impurities from deep within the pores.

This foam cleanser pairs well with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin after cleansing. Use it in your evening routine as the second step after oil-based makeup removal, or as a standalone morning cleanser for oily skin.

Key Benefits

  • Deep pore cleansing — Activated charcoal draws out dirt, oil, and impurities from deep inside pores
  • Acne control — Neem and tea tree oil provide natural antibacterial action to reduce breakouts
  • Oil absorption — Multani mitti (fuller's earth) helps control excess sebum production
  • Soothing care — Aloe vera calms irritation and prevents over-drying

Key Ingredients

Activated Charcoal — Binds to and removes deep-seated impurities, excess oil, and toxins from pores

Neem — Natural antibacterial agent that fights acne-causing bacteria and reduces inflammation

Tea Tree Oil — Antiseptic and antimicrobial properties help control breakouts and soothe skin

Aloe Vera — Hydrates and calms the skin, reducing irritation from deep cleansing

Turmeric — Anti-inflammatory and brightening agent that evens skin tone

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Acne-prone skin
  • Combination skin with oily T-zone
  • Congested, clogged pores

Not Recommended For

  • Extremely dry skin — The deep-cleansing charcoal may strip already-dry skin of essential oils
  • Compromised skin barrier — The strong purifying action can exacerbate sensitivity or irritation
  • Rosacea or active eczema — Harsh ingredients may trigger flare-ups

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water to open pores
  2. Squeeze a pea-sized amount onto your fingertips
  3. Gently massage onto damp skin in circular motions for 30-60 seconds — avoid the eye area
  4. Rinse thoroughly with cool water to close pores
  5. Pat dry with a clean towel — do not rub

Routine Fit

Use morning and evening as the second step in a double-cleansing routine. Follow immediately with an alcohol-free toner applied to slightly damp skin to replenish hydration. After toner, apply a lightweight water-based serum and oil-free moisturiser to maintain the skin's moisture balance.
meta_desc: Mamaearth charcoal face wash for oily, acne-prone skin with neem and tea tree oil. Activated charcoal draws out impurities. Buy at Emart Bangladesh, COD.

content_html:
Some By Mi Super Matcha Pore Clean Cleansing is a gel cleanser formulated with 62% Matcha Water to gently purify pores and remove blackheads. In Bangladesh's humid climate, this lightweight gel helps control excess oil without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier.

This cleanser pairs well with an alcohol-free toner or lightweight essence after cleansing. It fits as the second step in a double-cleansing routine or as a standalone morning cleanser for normal to combination skin.

Key Benefits

  • Pore purification — Matcha Water (62%) helps tighten pores and remove impurities
  • Blackhead control — gel texture dissolves sebum and dead skin cells from pores

Key Ingredients

Matcha Water (62%) — antioxidant-rich ingredient that soothes inflammation and controls sebum production

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Combination skin
  • Skin with visible pores and blackheads

Not Recommended For

title: Clean & Clear Exfoliating Oil Free Face Wash 150ml
content_html:
Clean & Clear Exfoliating Oil Free Face Wash is a foaming cleanser formulated with micro-beads to help buff away dead skin and excess oil. For skin battling acne and blemishes in Bangladesh's humid climate, this UK-imported wash provides a refreshing, grit-free cleanse without stripping the skin.

This foam cleanser pairs best with an alcohol-free toner applied to damp skin immediately after washing. Position it as the first step in your evening routine to prepare skin for targeted acne treatments.

Key Benefits

  • Exfoliating wash — Micro-beads physically slough off dead skin cells, helping to unclog pores and reduce blemishes.
  • Oil-free — Rinses clean without adding extra oil, suitable for shine-prone skin.

Key Ingredients

Micro-beads — Fine particles that provide gentle physical exfoliation to remove surface impurities and smooth skin texture.

Best For

  • Oily skin
  • Acne-prone skin
  • Combination skin with an oily T-zone

Not Recommended For

  • Dry skin — the exfoliating action of micro-beads may over-strip already dehydrated skin and worsen dryness.
  • Sensitive skin — physical exfoliating particles can cause irritation and micro-tears on a compromised barrier.

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water.
  2. Squeeze a small amount (approximately a pea-size) onto your palm and lather between your hands.
  3. Gently massage the foam onto your face in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, focusing on areas prone to bumps and blackheads.
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry with a clean towel.
  5. Use twice daily, morning and evening, or as directed by a dermatologist.

Routine Fit

Use this cleanser as your first step after removing makeup (if any). Follow with an alcohol-free toner on damp skin, then proceed with a serum or moisturiser suitable for acne-prone skin.
meta_desc: Clean & Clear exfoliating oil-free face wash for oily, acne-prone skin with micro-beads — UK import. Buy original at Emart Bangladesh — COD available.
